name: Brha (برحة)
description: A comprehensive transportation and logistics platform for vehicles and horses. Features real-time tracking via Google Maps, dynamic pricing, and seamless driver connections.
features: Live interactive maps visualizing active shipment and transportation requests.
Shipment scheduling, dynamic fee calculation, and driver matching.
Accurate live location tracking of active drivers for customers.
Comprehensive dashboard for managing vehicle fleets and service types.
my_role: Mobile Logistics Developer - Built a map-driven logistics experience where transportation requests are visualized instantly on interactive maps, allowing users and drivers to discover nearby opportunities in real time across multiple cities.
